commit_scope: Generalize COND in the Form→asm lowerer along two axes, both as DATA: the compare op and the result lane. lo-cond carried only LE over an integer-w0 result; a real model block (f16-decode's fd-mag/fd-value) branches on EQ-against-0/1 and the branches produce FLOATS. lo-cond2 became the lane-agnostic lo-cond-frame; the branch that SKIPS the then-block is the NEGATION of the compare via the data table lo-cmp-skip (LE→GT, EQ→NE, LT→GE, GE→LT, GT→LE, NE→EQ); lo-fcond (tag 6 under lo-fnode) reuses the same frame with lo-fnode-lowered d0 branches. Closes two of the four named-next gaps for lowering fd-f16/GQA as one native binary (EQ-cond + float-result COND); general inter-function CALL and float recursion remain.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/form-lower.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-lower-condgen-band.fk -> '✓ → 15' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent'.

clang/LLVM ORACLE (otool -tvVj of clang -c -arch arm64): eqsel = mov w1,w0(2a0003e1) ; cmp w1,#0(7100003f) ; b.ne +3(54000061) ; movz w0,#1(52800020) ; b +2(14000002) ; movz w0,#0(52800000) ; ret(d65f03c0). fsel = cmp w0,#0(7100001f) ; b.ne +4(54000081) ; movz w0,#0(52800000) ; scvtf d0,x0(9e620000) ; b +2(14000002) ; scvtf d0,x0(9e620000) ; ret(d65f03c0). clang confirms, never in the native path.

Verdict bits: 1 eqsel byte-identical (EQ wired into the integer-result COND — b.ne, not b.gt); 2 fsel byte-identical (float-result COND — same frame, branches produce d0 via lo-fnode); 4 lo-cmp-skip is data both ways (EQ tag14→NE cond1, LE tag5→GT cond12); 8 the existing LE program re-lowers byte-identical to the clang oracle (fa-bcond 12 == old fa-bgt).
Manifest row added: 'form-lower-condgen fkc 15' next to its kin form-lower-cvt / form-lower-cond.

No regression: form-lower (31), form-lower-cond (31), form-lower-rec (31) all re-cross four-way through the generalized frame — the LE path is byte-for-byte unchanged because fa-bcond 12 over a positive offset equals the prior fa-bgt encoding.

fourth_arm_outputs: form-lower-condgen: verdict 15, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI has not run yet for this branch. The change generalizes a Form lowering recipe + adds a proof band + a fourth-arm manifest row; CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite.

deploy_validation.notes: Form stdlib lowerer recipe + proof band + ledger update; no public HTTP endpoint or service change. The recipe reaches the kernels through the repo, not a deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 15, 0 divergent); CI and merge remain pending. No deploy applies to a Form stdlib lowerer recipe.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: form-lower's COND now lowers an EQ (and any compare, as data) and produces FLOAT branches, not only LE over an integer result — the two control-flow shapes a real model block (fd-mag/fd-value) needs. Go/Rust/TS/fkwu agree on verdict 15, each lowered image byte-identical to clang, and the existing LE bands are byte-for-byte unchanged.
public_endpoints: none changed; the recipe is a Form stdlib lowerer body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: validate.sh runs form-lower-condgen-band on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to the identical verdict 15 with 0 divergent.
Oracle byte-conviction: eqsel (integer EQ-cond) and fsel (float-result EQ-cond) each lower byte-for-byte to the clang -c sequence; lo-cmp-skip negates each compare to its skip-branch.
No regression: form-lower / form-lower-cond / form-lower-rec re-cross four-way at 31 — the LE path is byte-identical through the generalized frame.
